violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed breading that was on the shelf and the bag was open and was not closed.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Observed wet towels on the counter at time of inspection.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Observed chicken sitting in cold water in the sink at time of inspection.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed food items not date marked that were in the coolers at time of inspection.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed bucket of breaded chicken sitting in the hand sink at the time of inspection.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed ice chute in West Pepsi dispenser in C-store needs to be cleaned.
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
